MDCL_SRGCL_PCMKR_AMT 
LABEL: 
Medical/Surgical Pacemaker Amount ($) 
DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for the medical/surgical pacemaker supplies related to 
the beneficiary's stay.
